# Bodies sind STUBS — Cortex-Logik (Event-Emit / Dispatch / Engine-Call) manuell ergaenzen.

async def ${handler_action}():
    log.info("HTTP ${endpoint}: ${ID} action -- TODO implement")
    # SCAFFOLDER STUB. Implement with one of:
    #   - emit Event:    gateway.emit(<EventName>(...))
    #   - dispatch:      store.dispatch(CortexAction(action=store_actions.<x>(),
    #                                                keys=USER_KEYS,
    #                                                source="api.${id}"))
    #   - engine method: await engine.<name>.<method>()
    return {"ok": True}

${state_handler_block}
# Routen-Registrierung: nach den letzten api.add_api_route(...) Aufrufen anhaengen
# (~ Zeile 475-495 in main.py).

api.add_api_route("${endpoint}", ${handler_action}, methods=["POST"])
${state_route_line}
